name: Baked Apples- Crock-Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix raisins and sugar.
2. Fill the center of each apple with the mixture.
3. Sprinkle cinnamon over the apples.
4. Dot the tops with butter.
5. Place the apples in the Crock-Pot.
6. Add 1/2 cup water to the pot.
7. Cover; cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours (High: 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 hours).
